path: Problem: Calculate a running (expanding) average that includes all values from a fixed start cell down to the current row and updates when filled down
Action: Use AVERAGE with a mixed reference (absolute start, relative end) and copy/fill down
Observation: Locking the first cell with absolute references keeps the start of the range fixed while the relative end expands per row
Problem: Display the calculated average to a fixed number of decimal places
Action: Apply number formatting (or ROUND) to 3 decimal places
Observation: Formatting changes display without changing the underlying value; ROUND changes the stored result
Resolution: Format cells as Number with 3 decimals OR =ROUND(AVERAGE([fixed_start_cell]:[current_row_cell]),3)
